author: Miguel Grinberg
blog_title: The Flask Mega-Tutorial Part I: Hello, World!
summary: This article is the first part of a comprehensive tutorial series on building web applications using Python and the Flask framework. It covers the initial setup of a Flask project, including installing Python and Flask, creating virtual environments, and setting up a basic Flask application structure. The tutorial aims to guide beginners through the process of creating a simple 'Hello, World!' application with Flask.
